title: Smoke-Cold Resinous Irish Kiwifruit Crumble
description: A unique and refreshing Irish dessert featuring kiwifruit, with an added smoky twist and a crumbly texture, perfect for post-workout
instructions: Preheat your oven to 375° F (190° C).
In a large mixing bowl, combine the oat flour, almond butter, coconut sugar, cocoa powder, and smoked sea salt. Mix until well combined.
Add in the chia seeds and mix until a crumbly texture forms.
In a separate bowl, mix together the cold-pressed sesame oil and vanilla extract.
Add the sesame oil mixture to the crumbly mixture and stir until a dough forms.
In a separate bowl, slice the kiwifruit into thin pieces and set aside.
In a 9x9 inch baking dish, arrange the kiwifruit slices in a single layer.
Top the kiwifruit with the crumbly dough, spreading it evenly to cover the entire surface.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with additional kiwifruit slices if desired.
